test.template:
Run the full test suite with coverage report and show any failures.
Focus on the failing tests and suggest fixes.

deploy.template:
Review the current code for any issues, then build and deploy the project.
Check for: missing env vars, hardcoded configs, console.logs, TODOs.
Report what was done.

lint.template:
Run the linter and auto-fix any issues found.
If there are remaining warnings, list them.

review.description: Code review de los últimos cambios
review.template:
Review the recent git changes:
!`git log --oneline -10`
Check for bugs, security issues, performance problems, code style.
Suggest improvements.

component.description: Crear un componente React con TypeScript
component.template:
Create a new React component named $ARGUMENTS with TypeScript support.
Include proper typing, basic structure, and a story file.
Place it in src/components/.

db-migrate.description: Crear una migración de base de datos
db-migrate.template:
Create a new database migration file for: $ARGUMENTS
Use the existing migration patterns in the project.
Include both up and down migrations.

commit.template:
Review the current changes:
!`git diff --stat`
Create a meaningful commit message and commit all changes.
Use conventional commits format.
